name: Locker Room Content
description: Exclusive behind-the-scenes content from the locker room before, during, or after matches. Raw, authentic moments that fans rarely see.

context.example: Pre-match scenes | Demo Brand vs Hajduk

guidelines: Raw, authentic footage with minimal editing. Natural audio preferred over music — the sounds of preparation, team talks, and camaraderie. 15-30 seconds. No tactical or sensitive content. Focus on atmosphere: shirt hanging, boot lacing, team huddle, handshakes. Slightly desaturated grade for a documentary feel. Must be approved by the manager before posting.
